caption: The video captures a significant event, likely a celebration or commemoration of the Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP) Foundation Day, as indicated by the text "भारतीय जनता पार्टी स्थापना दिवस" displayed prominently at the top. The scene is divided into two main frames: on the left, a prominent figure, possibly a leader, is seen addressing an audience, wearing traditional attire with an orange and green scarf. The background features repeated BJP logos, reinforcing the party's branding. On the right, a large group of attendees, also dressed in similar attire with orange caps, listens attentively. The setting suggests a formal gathering, with the audience seated in rows, indicating a well-organized event. The overall atmosphere conveys a sense of unity and celebration among the party members.
